---
title: "Resume & CV"
toc: false
---

## Resume

[Download Resume (PDF)](cv/resume.pdf){.btn .btn-primary download="resume.pdf"}

<iframe src="cv/resume.pdf" class="pdf-frame" style="height:600px"></iframe>

## Curriculum Vitae

[Download CV (PDF)](cv/cv.pdf){.btn .btn-primary download="cv.pdf"}

<iframe src="cv/cv.pdf" class="pdf-frame" style="height:800px"></iframe>

<!-- PDFs are rebuilt automatically by `quarto render` via the pre-render hook in _quarto.yml. -->
